---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new compatibility target
title: "[Request]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Why It Helps

How would this improve exploration, combat, rewards, compatibility, accessibility, or server administration?

## Details

Any examples, screenshots, config ideas, or related mods to reference?

## Compatibility Notes

List any Minecraft, Fabric, server, or modpack constraints that matter.
